name: Appointments: Upsert Policy

description.en: Save the appointment booking policy for your agent. Configure timezone, office hours, slot intervals, buffer times, minimum notice periods, and available services.
description.de: Speichere die Terminbuchungsrichtlinie für deinen Agenten. Konfiguriere Zeitzone, Geschäftszeiten, Slot-Intervalle, Pufferzeiten, Mindestvorlaufzeiten und verfügbare Dienstleistungen.
description.fr: Enregistrez la politique de reservation de rendez-vous de votre agent. Configurez le fuseau horaire, les horaires d ouverture, les intervalles de creneaux, les temps tampon, le delai minimum et les services disponibles.
description.es: Guarda la politica de reservas de tu agente. Configura la zona horaria, el horario laboral, los intervalos, los margenes, el aviso minimo y los servicios disponibles.
description.ro: Salveaza politica de programari a agentului tau. Configureaza fusul orar, programul, intervalele sloturilor, timpii tampon, timpul minim de preaviz si serviciile disponibile.

bot: Use this when the user wants to save appointment configuration changes such as timezone, office hours, slot interval, buffer, notice period, or service settings.

inputs.name: Policy

description.fr: Objet JSON contenant la politique de rendez-vous
description.es: Objeto JSON con la politica de citas
description.ro: Obiect JSON care contine politica de programari

inputs.bot: A JSON string containing the full appointment policy. Include all fields: timezone, availability, minNoticeMinutes, bufferMinutes, maxDaysAhead, slotIntervalMinutes, and services.

success.ro: Setarile pentru programari au fost salvate.
